input.background: Say whether each of the boldface numbers is a parameter or a statistic.
input.question: Percent African American. Data from a standard metropolitan area (SMA) indicate that 12% of the inhabitants are African American. A telephone survey that was based on a random-digit-dialing machine found that 8% of respondents were African American.

output.answer: The number 12% is a parameter. The number 8% is a statistic.

percent_african_american_sma.description: The percentage of African American inhabitants in the standard metropolitan area (SMA).

percent_african_american_survey.description: The percentage of African American respondents in the telephone survey.
